// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action attribute expressions.
// Use these in templates instead of hardcoding action URLs.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// Opt is the name of a Datastar action option.
type Opt string

const (
	OptContentType         Opt = "contentType"
	OptFilterSignals       Opt = "filterSignals"
	OptSelector            Opt = "selector"
	OptHeaders             Opt = "headers"
	OptOpenWhenHidden      Opt = "openWhenHidden"
	OptPayload             Opt = "payload"
	OptRetry               Opt = "retry"
	OptRetryInterval       Opt = "retryInterval"
	OptRetryScaler         Opt = "retryScaler"
	OptRetryMaxWaitMs      Opt = "retryMaxWaitMs"
	OptRetryMaxCount       Opt = "retryMaxCount"
	OptRequestCancellation Opt = "requestCancellation"
)

type option struct {
	key   Opt
	value string
}

// WithOption creates an action option key-value pair.
// The value is a raw JavaScript expression
// (use "'auto'" for a JS string, "true" for a boolean).
func WithOption(key Opt, value string) option {
	return option{key: key, value: value}
}

func writeOptions(b *strings.Builder, options []option) {
	b.WriteString(", {")
	for i, o := range options {
		if i > 0 {
			b.WriteString(", ")
		}
		b.WriteString(string(o.key))
		b.WriteString(": ")
		b.WriteString(o.value)
	}
	b.WriteString("}")
}

func optionsLen(options []option) int {
	if len(options) == 0 {
		return 0
	}
	n := len(", {}")
	for i, o := range options {
		if i > 0 {
			n += len(", ")
		}
		n += len(o.key) + len(": ") + len(o.value)
	}
	return n
}

// POSTPagePostRate references /post/{slug}/rate/
func POSTPagePostRate(slug string, query QueryPOSTPagePostRate, options ...option) string {
	var (
		scoreStr string
	)

	if query.Score != 0 {
		scoreStr = strconv.FormatInt(query.Score, 10)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Score != 0

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/post/") + len(slug) + len("/rate/") + len("'") + optionsLen(options) + len(")")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Score != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("score=") + len(scoreStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/post/")
	b.WriteString(slug)
	b.WriteString("/rate/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Score != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("score=")
		b.WriteString(scoreStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("'")
	writeOptions(&b, options)
	b.WriteByte(')')

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPagePostRate struct {
	Score int64 `query:"score"`
}
